roa.docketEntryComment: PROB TRANSFER TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY SENT
APD PC1203,9 TRANSFER OUT (TO CONTRA COSTA CO) - FILED

/CAL: APD 1203,9PC  MOTION TO TRANSFER PROBATION FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTYTO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY/MO GRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/

/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 1Y/X:(STAYED)/CTS:58/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT TO UNDERGO 1 YEAR OF OUTPATIENT DRUG ABUSE TREATMENT IN LIEU OF 1 YEAR IN COUNTY JAIL/WS/WEAP/WEAP2/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT TO NOT POSSESS POLYMER 80 COMPONENTSOR EXPLOSIVES/RESTR/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/IND/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/OR25/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:08-14-19/PPRF/REMA/ARBUCKLE/DOP/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENDANT NO LONGER BE ON HOME DETENTION AND THAT THE GPS DEVICE BE REMOVED FROM HIS PERSON/OR/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONT/STWPX/DOP/CTORD: THAT THE DEFENDANT MAY ATTEND CHURCH ON SUNDAYS AT 2500 CHARLES AVE, IN PINOLE AND MEDICAL TREATMENTON MONDAYS AND WEDNESDAYS AT KAISER HOSPITAL IN VALLEJO/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT: CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON: GARY PRENETA/  /TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OFALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX:07-23-19(60TH DAY)/987,2/ORNAS/X:AS ACONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ONTHE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/DEF:SHALL BE PLACED ON HOME DETENTION AND FITTED WITH A GPS AND IS ORDEREDTO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/WEAP/WS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 06-25-19, D11/DOP/
